description:
Message payload for catalog/pull

This schema is part of the Long Term Support of Beckn Protocol V2.0 API specification and MUST NOT be extended. Any domain-specific extension must use the property of this schema which is of type Attribute.

mode.description:
- `FULL` — returns the latest version of each matching catalog.
- `INCREMENTAL` — returns all catalog versions indexed between
  `fromDate` and `toDate` (inclusive).

filters.description: Optional filters narrowing which catalogs are returned

networkIds.description: Filter by network IDs (empty = all networks)

schemaTypes.description: Filter by schema type URIs (empty = all types)

catalogIds.description: Explicit catalog IDs to pull (alternative to filters)

limit.description: Maximum number of catalogs to return (server may apply its own cap)

fromDate.description: Inclusive lower bound for INCREMENTAL mode

toDate.description: Inclusive upper bound for INCREMENTAL mode

title: CatalogPullAction
